name: get_document_segments
description: Get segment count and workflow info for a document. Use before add_document_qa to check how many segments exist. If the document has multiple segments, ask the user which segment (page) to analyze.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

document_id.description: The unique identifier of the document

name: add_document_qa
description: Add a new QA analysis to a document segment by invoking the qa-regenerator. Use this when the user wants additional analysis, deeper analysis, or more questions about a specific document segment.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

document_id.description: The unique identifier of the document

question.description: The question to ask about the segment
